pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-015 (Data Quality) scores 0.449 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for LLMOps Engineer: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.449 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Quality KSA DQ-T-015 as a discrete competency for LLMOps Engineer?

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Data quality content is governance/reporting, not LLM quality engineering. Final decision: exclude.
